rag_rules: Fix unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations in AGREE contracts by tracing root causes or removing invalid clauses.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE annex elements refer to visible AADL features or declared helpers only.
Place assumptions and guarantees in valid component type scopes, not implementation scopes.
Avoid using subcomponent ports directly in component type contracts.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must reference valid, visible identifiers or declared helpers.
Component type contracts should not include implementation-level bindings or subcomponent port references.
anti_patterns: Do not add new architecture elements to resolve AGREE type errors; instead, fix or remove invalid clauses.
Do not place component type contracts in implementation scopes where subcomponent bindings are not yet defined.
